Notice Of Motion To Set Aside The Entry Of Default And Default Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 473
Off Calendar Jun-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Andre LeLievre telephone number 916-929-0130 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Northern California Collection Service, Inc.
Brandon Woodward of Catanzarite Law Corporation telephone number 714-520-5544 appeared by telephone for Defendants Bruce Hodgson and Cheri Hodgson.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court cofirmed its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS BRUCE HODGSON AND CHERI HODGSON'S Motion To Set Aside The Entry Of Default And Default Judgment Pursuant To CCP 473(b) is denied. The motion is not timely filed as to the request to set aside the default. Since the default cannot be set aside, there is no useful purpose served by setting aside the default judgment even if good cause has been shown to do so, which it has not. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
